summary: The diff shows frontend component fixes (CattleForm, CustomerForm, CattleManagement, CustomerManagement, useQueries, etc.) with ref-based submission guards and proper mutation handling. However, the primary requirement — fixing the Motoko compilation error in backend/main.mo — is entirely absent from the diff. No backend files were modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Identify and fix the Motoko compilation error in backend/main.mo that is preventing successful deployment to the Internet Computer network.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff contains no changes to backend/main.mo or any backend files. The compilation error fix is the primary goal of this build request, yet no backend file was added or modified.

hallucinated_features.description: Changes to MilkProductionChart.tsx, DeliveryReports.tsx, frontend-file-summaries.txt, and project_state.json were included in the diff but are not required by REQ-1 or REQ-2.
hallucinated_features.reason: These files are not mentioned in REQ-1 or REQ-2 as needing changes. Modifying DeliveryReports.tsx and MilkProductionChart.tsx goes beyond the stated requirements of fixing the backend compilation error and preserving existing form submission behavior.
